title: Nagy's Forge
description: This mod introduces, mobs, and more!
body:
# This a mod that me and my friend made, to basically, simulate one of his ocs, and to laugh a bit, im just publishing this to use it on a server, i can play with him, (basically the reason im publishing this here).

## This mod adds:

- __Waks__ (which are little creatures and they are very mutated so there's a lot of variations).

- __Biomes__ (The Walkie Talkie Plains, The Meetup, etc).

- __Ores__ (only ruby for now...).

- __Some__ equipment (K.W.I.B.A., and Ruby Weapons and Armor).

- And a whole mod tab, with ***all modded elements there***
